highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 3.119.4 adds GTK4 views, Linux Bionic, Tizen x64/arm64 support, and .NET 10 SDK compatibility.
highlights_body: New platform support spans Linux Bionic (Android-like) native assets, GTK4 via GirCore, Tizen on x64 and arm64, and a .NET 10 SDK upgrade. On Windows, MAUI TabBar SKGLView rendering is fixed and net48 full-framework targeting is added. Security mitigations and multiple native dependency updates are also included.

bullets.lead: SKManagedStream reworked: parent/child chain replaced with SKData snapshot
bullets.detail: The internal stream lifetime model is replaced with a cleaner SKData snapshot approach, fixing edge-case disposal issues and simplifying the ownership model.
SKGLView no longer stops rendering after a tab switch in a MAUI TabBar on Android.
SKDrawingArea in GTK4 was triggering a Cairo assertion failure; the rendering path has been corrected.
Native AoT builds using IlcDisableReflection=true no longer crash at startup.

bullets.lead: tvOS native builds split to device and simulator frameworks
bullets.detail: tvOS NativeReference targets now correctly separate device and simulator slices, matching the iOS pattern.

bullets.lead: DesignMode detection uses property directly in WinForms
bullets.detail: SkiaSharp.Views.WindowsForms now uses the DesignMode property directly rather than reflection-based detection.
Native library assets for Linux Bionic (the Android-like Linux variant) are now included, enabling SkiaSharp use in Bionic-based environments.

bullets.lead: GTK4 view added via GirCore bindings
bullets.detail: A new SkiaSharp.Views.Gtk4 package provides SKDrawingArea for GTK4 applications using the GirCore.Gtk-4.0 bindings.

bullets.lead: Tizen x64 and arm64 native builds added
bullets.detail: Tizen support expands to x64 and arm64 architectures with updated Studio 6.1 tooling and TFM fixes.
The build system is updated to the .NET 10 SDK with explicit workload version pinning for reproducible builds.
A net48 (Windows .NET Framework 4.8) full-framework build target is added for Windows validation scenarios.

bullets.lead: C# 13 support on legacy TFMs via PolySharp
bullets.detail: PolySharp is used to polyfill C# 13 language features on legacy target frameworks, keeping the codebase on the latest language version everywhere.

bullets.lead: Spectre mitigations enabled for all native binaries
bullets.detail: Spectre v1 mitigation flags are now applied to both libSkiaSharp.dll (Windows) and libSkiaSharp.so (Linux/Android).
libpng updated to 1.6.58 (from 1.6.54), libwebp to 1.6.0, brotli to 1.2.0, and unused dependencies have been removed.

contributor_summaries.4Darmygeometry: Added Linux Bionic native assets support and HarfBuzz platform improvements
contributor_summaries.sshumakov: Enabled Spectre mitigation flags for Windows and Linux native binaries
contributor_summaries.ramezgerges: Improved the Android NDK build configuration
contributor_summaries.SimonvBez: Fixed SKGLView not rendering after tab switch in MAUI TabBar

preview_summaries.v3.119.4-preview.1.1: Preview 1 introduced Linux Bionic support, GTK4 views, Tizen x64/arm64 builds, .NET 10 SDK, the MAUI TabBar fix, tvOS build splits, GTK4 crash fix, SKManagedStream rework, and numerous dependency updates.
preview_summaries.v3.119.3-preview.1.1: Preview 1 of 3.119.3 delivered Spectre mitigations for Linux, the AoT reflection fix, Linux ARM64 crash fix, and libpng/libwebp/brotli updates.

harfbuzz_summary: Ships HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.1.5 with Linux Bionic support, tvOS build fixes, and the .NET 10 SDK update from this release.
